subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! Although for some time no letter hath been written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات القدس اگر چه چندی است که ورقه ای مسطور نگشت
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
